response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with impressive low-latency systems work, but he does not meet this role's core mandatory requirements. His professional C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 (plus a thesis project), far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++. His recent decade is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. He also lacks fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience — RIDE Capital was retail-investment fintech on a Node/GraphQL stack — and shows no SQL Server or Oracle background. The gap on both the primary language and the domain requirement makes him a poor fit despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, caching, fibers at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and DevOps tooling
Broad polyglot background with some professional C/C++ exposure and systems-level work
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ (2014-2015), versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
Strong systems engineering and CI/CD fundamentals
